name: Frankfurter Gruene Sauce (Frankfurt Green Sau
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Mixed herbs (parsley, chives, chervil, borage, dill)
3 cups Spinach greens, watercress, tarragon, basil, pimpernel
1 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
3/4 cup Low-fat cottage cheese (pressed through a fine sieve)
Small amount of ground white pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Select all or some of the herbs and greens listed in the ingredients.
2. Wash and drain thoroughly.
3. Coarsely chop the greens to about 3 cups total.
4. In a blender or food processor, combine 2 cups of the greens with sour cream or yogurt and onions.
5. Add a few tablespoons of cream if needed for smoothness.
6. Puree the mixture until smooth.
7. Finely chop the remaining greens and stir into the puree.
8. Stir in mayonnaise and low-fat cottage cheese until smooth and creamy.
9. Season with salt, pepper, and sugar.
10. The hard-boiled eggs can be mixed into the sauce or used as a garnish.
11. Makes 2-3 cups.
